lines.text: Welcome. You are Nguzo's eyes and hands on the ground, the inspector who makes the whole network trustworthy.
This is your dashboard, and it has three sections in the left rail.
Inspections, where jobs wait for you to physically verify a supplier's machine before it can move.
Yard Audits, where you record a full mechanical and legal check of any asset in a supplier's yard.
And Border Log, where you record real wait times and clearance overrides at the border posts.
Everything you confirm here unlocks the next stage for the client and the supplier, so accuracy matters.
Nothing moves until you say it's real. Let's walk through each part.
